data.description:
The scaffolding all scripted steps plug into.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A scripted-step registry + step interface, wired into the executor.
- [ ] Side-effecting steps are idempotent via the (run_id, step_id) marker.
Files: src/rebar/llm/workflow/steps.py
data.title: WS-E1: Step-registry framework + idempotency wrapper
